description.description: The rule stated compactly (what is true / must hold). Keep it short; prose detail goes in the note body.

scope.description: Optional sub-scope within the domain (topic/area) this rule applies to.

priority.description: Higher = surfaced/applied first when rules conflict.

trigger_phrases.description: Phrases/intents that should surface this rule on demand.

topic_globs.description: Topic/path globs the rule applies to (code projects); use trigger_phrases/scope for non-code domains.

always_apply.description: If true, part of the baseline context; otherwise loaded on-demand.

status.description: Deprecated rules are kept for history but not applied.

last_verified_at.description: When the rule was last confirmed correct (ISO-8601). Drives the stale_unverified lint.

stale_after_days.description: Flag as stale if not verified within this many days.

source_refs.description: Note/artifact ids or URLs that justify the rule.
